task_completion.description: Verify that a case named 'Size_Anomaly_2024' with case number 'INV-SZA-007' was created in Autopsy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy application window is open, and the title bar or case properties display the case name 'Size_Anomaly_2024' and/or case number 'INV-SZA-007'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the disk image ntfs_undel.dd was added as a data source.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Data Sources' tree in the Autopsy interface lists 'ntfs_undel.dd'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'File Type Identification' ingest module was executed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Ingest messages, progress bar, or module results in Autopsy indicate that 'File Type Identification' has run or completed.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the pipe-delimited file inventory CSV.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, spreadsheet viewer, or terminal displays the contents of '/home/ga/Reports/file_size_inventory.csv', showing the exact pipe-delimited header 'FILENAME|FULL_PATH|SIZE_BYTES|ALLOCATION_STATUS|FILE_TYPE' and corresponding data rows.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the analytical report with all required sections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displays the contents of '/home/ga/Reports/size_anomaly_report.txt', containing sections for TOTAL_FILES, ALLOCATED_FILES, DELETED_FILES, TOTAL_ALLOCATED_BYTES, TOTAL_DELETED_BYTES, DELETED_TO_ALLOCATED_RATIO, ZERO_BYTE_FILES, SIZE_BRACKETS, LARGEST_FILE, SMALLEST_NONZERO_FILE, and a CONCLUSION.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Autopsy GUI to process the disk image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Autopsy graphical interface, rather than solely relying on terminal commands like 'fls' or 'icat' to bypass the GUI requirement.

integrity.description: Verify that the generated CSV and report contain actual forensic data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The CSV and report files should contain realistic numbers, file names, and byte counts derived from the disk image, not just empty templates or placeholder text.

integrity.description: Verify that the conclusion is a genuine assessment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The CONCLUSION section in the report should contain a logical assessment of the suspect's claim based on the data, rather than a direct copy-paste of the prompt's instructions.
